falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes below the 200-day moving average by at least 3%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bearish trend, contradicting the pattern's implied bullish setup and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal a breakout or significant market shift, directly refuting the indecisive HOLD stance.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score rises above 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly opposing the bottom pattern's expected behavior and invalidating the current verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
